mapper.insert: INSERT INTO submissions(problem_id, user_id, code, language, status, stdout, stderr, compile_output, runtime, memory, message, submit_time) VALUES (#{problemId}, #{userId}, #{code}, #{language}, #{status}, #{stdout}, #{stderr}, #{compileOutput}, #{runtime}, #{memory}, #{message}, #{submitTime})
INSERT INTO submission_test_cases(case_id, submission_id, status, runtime, memory, update_time) VALUES (#{caseId}, #{submissionId}, #{status}, #{runtime}, #{memory}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT status FROM submissions WHERE problem_id = #{id}
SELECT id, problem_id, user_id, code, language, status, stdout, stderr, compile_output, runtime, memory, message, submit_time FROM submissions WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, submission_id, case_id, status, runtime, memory, update_time FROM submission_test_cases WHERE submission_id = #{id}
SELECT id, problem_id, user_id, code, language, status, submit_time FROM submissions WHERE problem_id = #{problemId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, problem_id, user_id, code, language, status, submit_time FROM submissions
SELECT id, problem_id, user_id, code, language, status, submit_time FROM submissions WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id FROM submissions WHERE problem_id = #{id}
